name: list_projects
description: List all projects in an Azure DevOps organization. Returns project names, IDs, descriptions, state, and visibility. Use the organization path parameter to specify which organization to query.

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The name of the Azure DevOps organization (appears in the URL path).

parameters.name: api-version
parameters.description: Version of the API to use. Use '7.1'.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of projects to return. Default is 100.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of projects to skip for pagination.

parameters.name: stateFilter
parameters.description: Filter by project state. Values: 'wellFormed', 'createPending', 'deleting', 'new', 'all'. Default is 'wellFormed'.
